display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1. Инициализация
Screen создаёт MotionEngine + ShapeShifter + Coordinator
→ post-frame: coordinator.initialize() + viewModel.initState()
→ async: getSession() → _setupEngine() → StateMachine создаётся
→ loadState: loading → ready → Coordinator синхронизируется

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2. Tick Loop
TickService → StateMachine._onTick()
→ stateStream → ViewModel._onEngineState()
→ Riverpod state → Coordinator._onStateChanged()
→ motionEngine.setPhaseInfo() / setRemainingPhaseTicks()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3. Морфинг
StateMachine._advanceExercise() / _startRest() / _startNewCycle()
→ state.resetReason встроен в emit
→ Riverpod state → Coordinator._onStateChanged()
→ ShapeShifter.morphTo() + MotionEngine.resetPosition()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4. Рестарт
Screen: coordinator.reset() + orbCoordinator.reset()
→ viewModel.restartEngine() → _setupEngine(cached DTO)
→ новый StateMachine создаётся
→ Coordinators видят breath → активируются

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5. Рендеринг фигуры
MotionEngine/ShapeShifter.notifyListeners()
→ BreathShapeWidget rebuild
→ Painter рисует Path + точку

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6. Рендеринг орба
TickService → StateMachine → ViewModel → Riverpod state
→ OrbCoordinator._onStateChanged()
→ orbProgress.value = shapeDimension * progress
→ ValueListenableBuilder → EclipseOrb(size: ...)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathExerciseDTO
───
steps: List<BreathStepDTO>
restDuration: int
repeatCount: int
───
cycleDuration: вычисляемое
shape: circle/square/triangle
isRestOnly: bool

div.style: color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathSessionDTO
───
id: String
description: String
exercises: List<BreathExerciseDTO>

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ITickService
───
Stream<TickData> tickStream
───
Генерирует метроном
~1 тик в секунду

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
TickData
───
intervalMs: int
───
Фактический интервал
между тиками

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IBreathSessionService
───
Future<BreathSessionDTO> getSession(id)
───
Загружает данные сессии

div.style: color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathSessionStateMachine
═══════════════
Внутренние счётчики:
_exerciseIndex
_repeatCounter
_cycleTick
═══════════════
Управление:
pause() / resume() / complete()
═══════════════
Тик-обработчики:
_onBreathTick()
_onRestTick()
═══════════════
Переходы:
_startRest(isExerciseChange?)
_startNewCycle(isExerciseChange?)
_advanceExercise()

div.style: color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathSessionStateMachineState
───
status: pause/breath/rest/complete
phase: inhale/hold/exhale/rest
exerciseIndex: int
remainingTicks: int
activeStepId: String?
currentIntervalMs: int
───
resetReason: newCycle/rest/exerciseChange/null
totalPhases: int
currentPhaseIndex: int
currentPhaseTotalDuration: int
currentExerciseShape: SetShape?
nextExerciseShape: SetShape?

div.style: color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathViewModel
═══════════════
Async loading:
initState() → getSession() → _setupEngine()
SessionLoadState: loading → ready
═══════════════
Subscription:
_stateMachineSubscription:
StateMachine.stateStream
→ Riverpod state
═══════════════
Управление:
pause() / resume() / complete()
restartEngine() → _setupEngine(cached DTO)

div.style: color: rgb(183, 28, 28) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathSessionState
───
loadState: loading/ready/error
status: pause/breath/rest/complete
phase: inhale/hold/exhale/rest
exerciseIndex: int
remainingTicks: int
currentIntervalMs: int
timelineSteps: List<TimelineStep>
activeStepId: String?
───
resetReason: newCycle/rest/exerciseChange/null
totalPhases: int
currentPhaseIndex: int
currentPhaseTotalDuration: int
currentExerciseShape: SetShape?
nextExerciseShape: SetShape?

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathMotionEngine
═══════════════
Физика движения:
_position: 0.0 → 1.0
_currentVelocity
_targetVelocity
_phaseTargetPosition
═══════════════
Режимы:
Accelerating → Linear
Плавное достижение цели
за remainingPhaseTicks
═══════════════
API:
setActive(bool)
setPhaseInfo(totalPhases, currentPhaseIndex)
setRemainingPhaseTicks(int)
setIntervalMs(int)
resetPosition(double)
───
isActive: bool
normalizedPosition: 0..1

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathShapeShifter
═══════════════
Геометрия:
_currentPoints: 120 точек
_currentShape
_morphProgress: 0..1
═══════════════
Формы:
circle / square
triangleUp / triangleDown
═══════════════
Морфинг:
morphTo(shape) → анимация 800ms
Прямоугольные: через Path
С кругом: через interpolation
═══════════════
API:
initialize(center, size, vsync)
updateBounds(center, size)
morphTo(SetShape)
getCurrentPath() → Path
getPointPosition(time) → Offset

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathAnimationCoordinator
═══════════════
Оркестрация:
Слушает BreathSessionState (Riverpod)
Читает resetReason из state
═══════════════
Синхронизация:
status → motionEngine.setActive()
setPhaseInfo() при старте breath
remainingTicks → setRemainingPhaseTicks()
intervalMs → setIntervalMs()
═══════════════
Сброс:
reset(): деактивирует motionEngine,
сбрасывает кэши состояния
═══════════════
Морфинг по resetReason в state:
exerciseChange/rest → morphTo(shape)
newCycle → resetPosition(0.0)

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OrbAnimationCoordinator
═══════════════
Оркестрация:
Слушает BreathSessionState (Riverpod)
Читает resetReason из state
═══════════════
Прогресс:
inhale → lerp(min, max, phaseRaw)
exhale → lerp(min, max, 1-phaseRaw)
hold/rest/pause → frozen
═══════════════
maxProgress по форме:
circle → 0.8, остальные → 1.0
═══════════════
По resetReason в state:
обновляет maxProgress
сбрасывает orbProgress → min
═══════════════
Выход:
ValueNotifier<double> orbProgress

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LiveSessionCoordinator
═══════════════
Lifecycle:
первый resume → startSession()
pause → pauseSession()
resume из паузы → resumeSession()
complete → endSession()
═══════════════
Телеметрия:
phase/exerciseIndex changed
→ _handleTelemetry(state)
→ sendSample(phase, durationMs)

div.style: color: rgb(136, 14, 79) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathSessionScreen
═══════════════
Создаёт (initState):
BreathMotionEngine
BreathShapeShifter
BreathAnimationCoordinator
OrbAnimationCoordinator
LiveSessionCoordinator
═══════════════
Post-frame callback:
coordinator.initialize(state)
orbCoordinator.initialize(state)
viewModel.initState() [async]
═══════════════
Управление:
pause() / resume() / restartEngine()
═══════════════
Отображает:
BreathShapeWidget
EclipseOrb (ValueListenableBuilder)
BreathTimelineWidget
Кнопки управления

div.style: color: rgb(136, 14, 79) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathShapeWidget
───
ListenableBuilder:
motionController + shapeController
───
LayoutBuilder:
updateBounds() при resize
───
CustomPaint:
BreathShapePainter

div.style: color: rgb(136, 14, 79) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathShapePainter
═══════════════
Рендеринг:
1. Фигура (3 слоя):
- Outer glow
- Main stroke
- Inner highlight
───
2. Точка (4 слоя):
- Outer glow
- Mid glow
- Main circle
- Center highlight
═══════════════
Входы:
shapeShifter.getCurrentPath()
motionEngine.normalizedPosition
